query:
ALTER TABLE assets 
ADD COLUMN itemType VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'Asset' COMMENT 'Asset or Inventory',
ADD COLUMN subCategory VARCHAR(100) COMMENT 'Specific sub-category like Laptop, Generator, etc.',
ADD COLUMN branchCode VARCHAR(10) COMMENT 'Branch code like _NHQ, ABI, ADA, etc.',
ADD COLUMN itemCategoryCode VARCHAR(10) COMMENT 'Category code like CO, FF, GE, LA, etc.',
ADD COLUMN assetNumber INT COMMENT 'Sequential number for asset code generation',
ADD COLUMN productNumber VARCHAR(255) COMMENT 'Serial/Product number from manufacturer',
ADD COLUMN methodOfAcquisition VARCHAR(100) COMMENT 'How asset was acquired',
ADD COLUMN acquisitionDetails TEXT COMMENT 'Details if method is Other',
ADD COLUMN projectReference VARCHAR(255) COMMENT 'Project name or reference if applicable',
ADD COLUMN yearAcquired INT COMMENT 'Year of acquisition',
ADD COLUMN acquiredCondition VARCHAR(20) COMMENT 'New or Used',
ADD COLUMN currentDepreciatedValue DECIMAL(15,2) COMMENT 'Current depreciated value in NGN',
ADD COLUMN assignedToName VARCHAR(255) COMMENT 'Full name of person assigned to',
ADD COLUMN department VARCHAR(255) COMMENT 'Department of assigned person',
ADD COLUMN condition VARCHAR(100) COMMENT 'Physical condition of asset',
ADD COLUMN lastPhysicalCheckDate TIMESTAMP NULL COMMENT 'Date of last physical verification',
ADD COLUMN checkConductedBy VARCHAR(255) COMMENT 'Name and designation of person who conducted check',
ADD COLUMN remarks TEXT COMMENT 'Additional remarks and notes';
